meta.title: How to Build a Real-World AI Project Portfolio
meta.description:
Welcome! Join us for a live panel discussion on how you can go from courses to getting real-world experience and how to create your own AI project portfolio to help you land the job. DeepLearning.AI, in partnership with Omdena, has assembled a panel of machine learning practitioners who have gotten into the field from different paths. They will be sharing their personal experience and suggestions on how to build your own AI project portfolio.

We will be taking questions during the event. Please submit your question or upvote others' here:
https://app.sli.do/event/kn5THknwgvJHJKczFCXok1

Speakers
Anna Koroleva, Computational Linguist, PhD in NLP
https://www.linkedin.com/in/anna-koroleva-357334183/

Mohamed Amr, ML Engineer DigsFacts
https://www.linkedin.com/in/mamryehia/

Kennedy Wangari, AI Technology Consultant, United Nations
https://www.linkedin.com/in/kennedykwangari/

Rosana de Oliveira Gomes, Senior Data Scientist, HAKOM Time Series
https://www.linkedin.com/in/rosanaogomes/


Let us know how we're doing? We will be giving out discount codes for a selected number of people who fill out the survey: 
https://forms.gle/ZaxEqqiyuKZmBCvh9


Looking to connect with your peer learners, share projects, and swap advice? Join our AI community: 
https://community.deeplearning.ai/invites/ddzDLVa2jv

To learn more about us and signup for future events:
DeepLearning.AI: https://www.deeplearning.ai/
